title: Interactive Rebase — Squash and Reword
description: Use interactive rebase to squash three WIP commits into one clean commit, then rebase your feature branch onto main.
starterCode:
# (1) Start interactive rebase on the last 3 commits
# YOUR COMMAND HERE

# (2) In the rebase-todo editor, change picks to squash:
# pick a1b2c3 Add login form
# squash d4e5f6 WIP: fix validation
# squash 7g8h9i WIP: fix edge case

# (3) After squashing, rebase the feature branch onto main
# YOUR COMMAND HERE
solutionCode:
# Squash last 3 commits into one interactively
git rebase -i HEAD~3
# In the editor, change 2nd and 3rd 'pick' to 'squash' (or 's')
# pick a1b2c3 Add login form
# squash d4e5f6 WIP: fix validation
# squash 7g8h9i WIP: fix edge case

# After squashing, rebase feature branch onto main
git rebase main
hints: Use git rebase -i followed by a commit range like HEAD~3 to target the last 3 commits
In the rebase-todo file, replace 'pick' with 'squash' or 's' on the commits you want to fold into the previous one
After squashing, run git rebase main while on your feature branch to replay it on top of the latest main

validationRules.errorMessage: Use git rebase -i for interactive rebase
Target the last 3 commits with HEAD~3
Use squash or fixup to combine commits
Rebase the feature branch onto main
Use rebase, not merge, for this exercise

simulatedOutput.success:
Successfully rebased and updated refs/heads/feature/login.
Interactive rebase complete. 3 commits squashed into 1.

Current branch feature/login is up to date with main.

[feature/login 3c5e7a2] Add complete login feature
 Date: Thu Apr 24 2026
 3 files changed, 87 insertions(+)
simulatedOutput.failure: ERROR: Validation failed. Make sure you use git rebase -i HEAD~3 and include squash or fixup to combine commits, then git rebase main to update your branch.
